backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing payment submission, Stripe checkout session management, user profile storage, and admin access control using mixins for storage and authorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features to their affected files, components, and test IDs, covering actor initialization, query gating, admin page UI, and payment form behavior.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend file paths to short summaries describing each file's role, used as a reference for build planning and code navigation.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind layers and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens including colors, borders, and chart palette.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'Payment Submission Form' and mounting the app at the `#root` div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component with simple state-based routing between `PaymentPage` (default) and `AdminPage`, passing navigation callbacks as props.
frontend/src/components/AdminLoginGate.t: Light-themed admin login gate component displaying a lock icon, restricted-access messaging, and an Internet Identity login button with loading spinner.
frontend/src/components/PaymentForm.tsx: Payment form component that uses `useSubmitPayment` and `usePaymentForm`, adapts event handlers, disables submission while the actor is not ready, suppresses transient errors, and shows a success screen on completion.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flows, and persisting identity across page reloads via a React context provider.
frontend/src/hooks/usePaymentForm.ts: Custom hook managing payment form state, field-level validation (email, card number, expiry, CVV, amount), input formatting, and touched/error tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching all payments, submitting a payment, and getting/saving the caller's user profile via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, defines a warm neutral + amber OKLCH design token system, and provides reusable component classes for payment cards, inputs, and buttons.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page that displays a table of all payment records with stats (total payments, total amount), loading skeletons, error handling, and a refresh button.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentPage.tsx: Renders the main payment page layout including a sticky header with logo, SSL badge, and optional admin navigation button, wrapping the PaymentForm component in a centered content area with a footer.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash without page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts, oklch-based color tokens (amber, warm neutrals, semantic UI colors), border radii, box shadows, and animation keyframes, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state (version 29) for a payment form web app, listing existing features, known issues (payment submission failures, admin panel errors), and architectural notes.
